---
title: "CDADE Ablation Study"
author: "CDADE Team"
date: "2026-07-05"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# Ablation Study

## Variant overview

This stub will summarize the component-attribution analysis for the CDADE variants.

## Planned inputs

- Ablation summary: results/ablation/summary.csv
- Statistical reference: results/stats/summary.csv

## Sections

### Full pipeline

### No reconciliation

### No dynamic selection

### No diversity
